errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not the required authority

errors.name: PublisherMismatch
errors.msg: Publisher does not match the price feed publisher

errors.name: MakerAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Maker account does not match the resting order owner

errors.name: OrderOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Order is not owned by the caller

errors.name: InvalidMarketIndex
errors.msg: Invalid market index

errors.name: MarketMismatch
errors.msg: Account does not belong to this market

errors.name: MissingAccount
errors.msg: Account is missing from remaining_accounts

errors.name: SizeBelowLot
errors.msg: Order size is below the market lot size

errors.name: SizeNotAligned
errors.msg: Size must be a multiple of the lot size

errors.name: PriceNotAligned
errors.msg: Price is not a multiple of the tick size

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Price must be non-zero for a limit order

errors.name: InvalidLeverage
errors.msg: Leverage exceeds the market maximum

errors.name: InsufficientMargin
errors.msg: Insufficient available margin for this order

errors.name: NoLiquidity
errors.msg: Market order found no liquidity

errors.name: OrderbookFull
errors.msg: Orderbook side is at capacity

errors.name: OrderNotFound
errors.msg: Order id not found in the book

errors.name: TriggersFull
errors.msg: Trigger list is at capacity

errors.name: TriggerNotFound
errors.msg: Trigger not found

errors.name: NoTriggersFired
errors.msg: No triggers crossed the current price

errors.name: NotLiquidatable
errors.msg: Position health is above the maintenance margin; not liquidatable

errors.name: NoOpenPosition
errors.msg: Position is flat; nothing to liquidate or close

errors.name: FundingNotDue
errors.msg: Funding interval has not elapsed yet

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Deposit/withdraw amount must be non-zero

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: Withdraw amount exceeds available margin

errors.name: AccountStillDelegated
errors.msg: Account must be undelegated before this operation

errors.name: OpenPositionsExist
errors.msg: Cannot withdraw while positions are open

errors.name: OpenOrdersExist
errors.msg: Cannot withdraw while orders are resting

errors.name: EpochNotEnded
errors.msg: Tournament epoch has not ended yet

errors.name: VrfAlreadyPending
errors.msg: A VRF request is already in flight

errors.name: NoVrfPending
errors.msg: No VRF request is pending

errors.name: NoCandidates
errors.msg: No profitable participants to draw from

errors.name: WinnerMismatch
errors.msg: Winner account does not match the drawn candidate

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: CapacityExceeded
errors.msg: Account capacity exceeded
